$description: MNENA brand design tokens — single source of truth. Colors sampled directly from logo assets and the 2025 Brand Guideline PDF. The website tokens.css and the public /brand style guide page are generated from this file; edit here, not there.

meta.tagline: This Is Our Neighborhood. Let's Shape It Together.
meta.changelog: 1.1.0 — cream demoted from primary background to secondary accent; illustration palette codified from final brand artwork

deepTeal.name: Deep Teal
deepTeal.usage: Anchor color. Headers, footers, primary text on light backgrounds, badge background.

riverTeal.name: River Teal
riverTeal.usage: Secondary surfaces, links, wave motifs, subheadings on light backgrounds.

leafGreen.name: Leaf Green
leafGreen.usage: Buildings/trees in illustrations, success states, nature accents.

white.name: White
white.usage: Primary page background, text on dark surfaces, card surfaces, logo clear space.

poppyOrange.name: Poppy Orange
poppyOrange.usage: Sparingly: primary CTAs, alerts, star markers, autumn accents.

sunGold.name: Sun Gold
sunGold.usage: Tower Bridge, highlights, logo halo, playful accents.

skyBlue.name: Sky Blue
skyBlue.usage: Water highlights, info callouts, light accents on deep teal.

cream.name: Cream
cream.usage: Secondary accent: clouds in illustrations, date chips, small warm panels, text on deep teal. Not a page background.

sand.name: Sand
sand.usage: Paths/roads in illustrations, occasional warm accents.

illustrationPalette.note: Sampled from the final brand artwork. Use for illustration work alongside the core palette.

seafoamSky.name: Seafoam Sky
seafoamSky.usage: Illustration sky — muted seafoam teal, NOT cream. Cream is reserved for clouds and building highlights.

midGreen.name: Mid Green
midGreen.usage: Mid-layer canopies and lawns in illustrations.

backgroundSoft.note: Soft seafoam tint for alternating sections — echoes the illustration sky.

textPrimary.note: Near-black teal for body text; softer than pure black.

link.note: River Teal darkened for WCAG AA on white (6.2:1) and soft backgrounds.

ctaPrimaryText.note: Dark text on orange buttons; white fails AA on this orange.

imageOverlay.note: Deep-teal gradient overlay for photos in cards — unifies mixed photography.

avoid: White text on Leaf Green, River Teal, Sun Gold, or Poppy Orange (fails WCAG AA at body sizes)
Poppy Orange on Cream for text (decorative only)
Cream as a large page background — it's an accent now (chips, clouds, text on teal)
More than two accent colors in a single composition

heading.note: Successor to Source Serif Pro named in the brand PDF.

accent.note: Script accent — short phrases only, never body text, never all-caps.
Dancing Script moments: 'Welcome to the neighborhood'

spacing.note: Base-16 with a 1.5–1.6 multiplier; sections breathe at xl and above.

radius.note: Friendly and rounded — echoes the badge and sign design. No sharp corners on interactive elements.

variants.badge: Primary mark — shield badge with fanlight window, green buildings, river wave
variants.badgeOnGold: Badge in gold circle halo — social avatars, favicons
variants.horizontal: Badge + 'MARSHALL - NEW ERA / NEIGHBORHOOD ASSOCIATION' wordmark — site header, documents
variants.monochrome: Single-color badge (deep teal, cream, or white) — stamps, embroidery, low-color print

logo.clearSpace: Keep clear space equal to the height of the fanlight window on all sides.
rules: Do not recolor the badge outside approved monochrome variants
Do not stretch, rotate, or add effects (shadows, glows, outlines)
Do not place the full-color badge on busy photography — use the gold-circle or monochrome variant
MNENA acronym is fine after first use of the full name

illustration.style: Flat vector, layered silhouettes, no outlines or gradients within shapes — a modern take on the mid-century travel poster, looking at the Midtown Sacramento cityscape
illustration.heroSubjects: The gold Tower Bridge and the historic Marshall School (gold, American Classical Revival, arched fanlight window) anchor our corner of Midtown; the Capitol dome sits in the background skyline.
motifs: Marshall School in gold with fanlight window
river waves in River Teal/Sky Blue
illustration.composition: Skyline layers back-to-front: seafoam-teal sky (#7AB6A4) with cream clouds → downtown silhouette (deep teal/forest) → tree canopy (layered greens) → homes (cream/gold/teal) → foreground path or road (gold/sand)
illustration.palette: Greens dominate; sky is seafoam teal (never cream — cream is for clouds and building highlights); gold reserved for landmarks and paths; max two accent colors per scene
illustration.photography: Real neighbor photos are encouraged — candid, daylight, people doing things together. Warm edit, no heavy filters. In cards and grids, apply the deep-teal gradient overlay token (semantic.imageOverlay) to unify mixed photos. Illustration and photography can mix if illustration frames the photo (border, corner motifs), not overlaid on it.

sounds_like: The garden's tomatoes don't pick themselves 🍅
Third Monday, 6pm. Bring a friend, we'll bring the agenda.
not_like: Members are hereby notified of the upcoming general assembly…
Attendance at cleanup events is strongly encouraged.
